summary: Testing completed for ImageLightbox component integration. All features verified: Backend (6/6 tests passed) - library image upload/delete endpoints working. Frontend - ImageLightbox component renders correctly with all test IDs (image-lightbox, lightbox-counter, lightbox-close-btn, lightbox-prev-btn, lightbox-next-btn, lightbox-download-btn, lightbox-image, lightbox-thumb-{index}). Gallery page uses ImageLightbox instead of old Dialog viewer. Library page images are clickable (cursor-pointer class) and open lightbox. Blog page has ImageLightbox component integrated (no blog entries with images to test visually).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/projects/:id/library/entries/:entryId/images - uploads image successfully (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/projects/:id/library/entries/:entryId/images/:imageId - deletes image successfully (200)
Backend: GET /api/projects/:id/library/entries/:entryId - returns entry with 'images' array
Backend: DELETE non-existent image returns 404
Backend: GET /api/projects/:id/gallery - returns images array
Backend: POST /api/projects/:id/gallery/images - uploads image successfully (200)
Frontend: ImageLightbox component renders with data-testid='image-lightbox'
Frontend: ImageLightbox counter shows '1 of 2' format (data-testid='lightbox-counter')
Frontend: ImageLightbox close button present (data-testid='lightbox-close-btn')
Frontend: ImageLightbox download button present (data-testid='lightbox-download-btn')
Frontend: ImageLightbox prev/next buttons present (data-testid='lightbox-prev-btn', 'lightbox-next-btn')
Frontend: ImageLightbox thumbnail strip with data-testid='lightbox-thumb-{index}'
Frontend: ImageLightbox navigation works (counter updates on next click)
Frontend: ImageLightbox close button closes the lightbox
Frontend: Gallery page uses ImageLightbox (no old Dialog-based viewer)
Frontend: Gallery page - Upload Image button opens ImageUploader dialog
Frontend: Library page images have cursor-pointer class (clickable)
Frontend: Library page - clicking image opens ImageLightbox
Frontend: Library page - 'Add Image' button present (data-testid='upload-library-image-{entryId}')
Frontend: Blog page has ImageLightbox component integrated (verified in code)
critical_code_review_comments: ImageLightbox.jsx: Well-structured reusable component with proper keyboard support (Escape, ArrowLeft, ArrowRight), thumbnail strip, download functionality, and all required data-testid attributes
GalleryPage.jsx: Correctly replaced old Dialog-based image viewer with ImageLightbox component (lines 483-489)
BlogPage.jsx: ImageLightbox integrated for viewing blog entry images (lines 548-556), images have onClick handlers and cursor-pointer styling
LibraryPage.jsx: ImageLightbox integrated (lines 619-626), entry images have cursor-pointer class and onClick handlers (line 477-478)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_lightbox_image_1.jpg and TEST_lightbox_image_2.jpg in gallery for testing (cleaned up after tests). Uploaded TEST_library_lightbox.jpg to existing library entry for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ImageLightbox component fully tested. Key data-testids: image-lightbox, lightbox-counter, lightbox-close-btn, lightbox-prev-btn, lightbox-next-btn, lightbox-download-btn, lightbox-image, lightbox-thumb-{index}. Component integrated in GalleryPage (replaces old Dialog viewer), BlogPage (for blog entry images), and LibraryPage (for library entry images). Library images have cursor-pointer class and onClick handlers. Gallery images are clickable cards that open lightbox. Blog images in view dialog are clickable. Keyboard support: Escape closes, ArrowLeft/ArrowRight navigate.
